output_lean:
theorem blaschke_convergence_condition (f : ℂ → ℂ) 
    (hf_diff : DifferentiableOn ℂ f (Metric.ball 0 1))
    (hf_bdd : ∃ C, ∀ z ∈ Metric.ball 0 1, ‖f z‖ ≤ C)
    (hf_ne : ∃ z ∈ Metric.ball 0 1, f z ≠ 0)
    (z : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hz_zero : ∀ n, f (z n) = 0)
    (hz_ball : ∀ n, z n ∈ Metric.ball 0 1)
    (hz_complete : ∀ w ∈ Metric.ball 0 1, f w = 0 → w ∈ Set.range z) :
    Summable (fun n => 1 - ‖z n‖) := sorry
